summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Odd Justa app. All 8 backend pytest tests passed and all critical frontend flows worked end-to-end (Home with R17 tab, navigation to MatchAnalysis, SP vs Botafogo analysis page).
critical_code_review_comments: scraper.py `parse_calendar` uses soup.descendants which can be slow for large pages; consider iterating select('.event__match, .event__round') instead.
compute_fair_odds returns None when favorable==0 (line 408). Frontend OddCard should handle None gracefully (verified visually it does, but worth being aware).
Backend has no retry on Playwright failure; a transient flashscore outage will surface as 502. Stale-cache fallback exists which mitigates.
MatchAnalysis.jsx is 354 lines — acceptable but consider extracting GameRow/H2HRow/StatRow to /components for reuse.
Frontend timeout is 180s on /match/.../analysis which is appropriate for cold scrape; cached responses are <1s as observed.
seed_data_creation: none - app reads live data from Flashscore + Mongo cache
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend cache was already warm during testing, so test suite ran in <1s. For cold-cache validation use ?force=true on /api/rounds and /api/match/{id}/analysis (allow 60-180s). Validated values for G44gJJzh (SP vs Botafogo): fair_odds = {1:1.92, X:4.60, 2:3.83, 1X:1.35, 2X:2.09, 12:1.28}, totals = 10/10/3/23, percentages match expected. Round 17 has 10 matches and is correctly flagged 'Próxima'. Grêmio vs Santos (prHje7l2) mapping verified (home_slug=gremio, away_slug=santos).
